note: Last ~10 inbox emails per account. Primary is pulled live from the Gmail connector; secondary requires connecting that account.

emails.subject: Missing Football Already? The Top Leagues Are Back !
emails.snippet: The leagues are back for 2026/27. Grab the best seats at the best price before everyone else does.

emails.subject: Re: W-2 Request For 2025
emails.snippet: Hello Jack: Please reach out to Payroll@WMEAgency.com to assist with your query. Thank you.

emails.snippet: Discover all the ways you can use Loom. Try recording a Loom to add helpful context to your next assignments.

emails.snippet: You can help shape the future of the game.

emails.subject: What are Aston Villa going to do with £117m?
emails.snippet: Plus lots of Arsenal rumours, and Man United want a France World Cup star.
